articles.title: Alien Whistleblower Claims US Has 'Dismembered Gray Bodies' Hidden Inside Underground Military Bases
articles.summary: Timothy Alberino, an investigative writer, claimed in an interview on Redacted that the U.S. government has recovered alien biologics and that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies exist outside elected officials’ oversight. He said that the most sensitive UAP information is controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes, and that some operations are designed to avoid congressional oversight. Alberino referenced anecdotal eyewitness accounts of “gray aliens,” dismembered bodies, and transparent fluids at alleged crash‑retrieval sites, and cited former intelligence official David Grusch’s 2023 testimony that the government recovered non‑human biologics. No publicly available evidence has been produced to substantiate these claims, and U.S. defence agencies have not confirmed the existence of programmes involving recovered non‑human craft or biological material. Congressional interest has increased, with lawmakers calling for greater transparency and whistleblower protections, but the Pentagon maintains that investigations by the All‑Domain Anomaly Resolution Office have not yielded verified evidence of extraterrestrial activity.

en.title: Alien Whistleblower Claims US Has 'Dismembered Gray Bodies' Hidden Inside Underground Military Bases
en.summary: Timothy Alberino, an investigative writer, claimed in an interview on Redacted that the U.S. government has recovered alien biologics and that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies exist outside elected officials’ oversight. He said that the most sensitive UAP information is controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes, and that some operations are designed to avoid congressional oversight.

de.title: Außerirdischer Whistleblower behauptet, die USA hätten „graue Körper zerstückelt“, die in unterirdischen Militärstützpunkten versteckt seien
de.summary: Timothy Alberino, ein investigativer Autor, behauptete in einem Interview auf Redacted, dass die US-Regierung außerirdische Biologika geborgen habe und dass Absturzbergungsoperationen mit nichtmenschlichen Fahrzeugen und Leichen außerhalb der Aufsicht gewählter Beamter stünden. Er sagte, dass die sensibelsten UAP-Informationen von privaten Luft- und Raumfahrtunternehmen und stark abgeschotteten Verteidigungsprogrammen kontrolliert werden und dass einige Operationen darauf ausgelegt seien, der Aufsicht des Kongresses zu entgehen.

articles.title: Whistleblower claims CIA used DNA data from Ancestry and 23andMe customers in search for aliens
articles.summary: A whistleblower, philosopher and novelist Jason Reza Jorjani, claims the CIA allegedly used a backdoor to access 23andMe and Ancestry.com data to identify individuals with a genetic variance he says is linked to extraterrestrial DNA. Jorjani says he learned of the program from army veteran Lyn Buchanan, who claims he was a psychic spy in the CIA’s remote‑viewing program and that former CIA analyst Christopher “Kit” Green created the backdoor. Buchanan reports that he was approached by three people who identified themselves as Nordic aliens and that they asked him to help avoid CIA detection, while also claiming aliens have interbred with humans and that a “wedge” labeled “other” on ethnicity charts may contain unknown genetic markers. The Pentagon has stated there is no evidence of extraterrestrial existence, and a separate geneticist, Dr. Max Rempel, has suggested that alien DNA could have been inserted into humans, though he says it may not be harmful.

en.title: Whistleblower claims CIA used DNA data from Ancestry and 23andMe customers in search for aliens
en.summary: A whistleblower, philosopher and novelist Jason Reza Jorjani, claims the CIA allegedly used a backdoor to access 23andMe and Ancestry.com data to identify individuals with a genetic variance he says is linked to extraterrestrial DNA. Jorjani says he learned of the program from army veteran Lyn Buchanan, who claims he was a psychic spy in the CIA’s remote‑viewing program and that former CIA analyst Christopher “Kit” Green created the backdoor.

de.title: Whistleblower behauptet, die CIA habe DNA-Daten von Ancestry- und 23andMe-Kunden bei der Suche nach Außerirdischen verwendet
de.summary: Ein Whistleblower, Philosoph und Romanautor Jason Reza Jorjani, behauptet, die CIA habe angeblich eine Hintertür genutzt, um auf Daten von 23andMe und Ancestry.com zuzugreifen, um Personen mit einer genetischen Varianz zu identifizieren, die seiner Meinung nach mit außerirdischer DNA zusammenhängt. Jorjani sagt, er habe von dem Programm durch den Armeeveteranen Lyn Buchanan erfahren, der behauptet, er sei ein übersinnlicher Spion im Remote-Viewing-Programm der CIA gewesen und der ehemalige CIA-Analyst Christopher „Kit“ Green habe die Hintertür geschaffen.

articles.title: Trump’s Alien.gov Reveal Turns Into Immigration Satire and Leaves UFO Disclosure Community Furious
articles.summary: The launch of Alien.gov, expected by many to be a historic UFO disclosure, instead delivered a political immigration message. The rollout sparked backlash from UFO researchers, disclosure advocates, and ordinary Americans who sought answers. Critics compared the event to former Arizona Governor Fife Symington’s handling of the Phoenix Lights, questioning government credibility. The controversy raises concerns about public trust and transparency.

en.title: Trump’s Alien.gov Reveal Turns Into Immigration Satire and Leaves UFO Disclosure Community Furious
en.summary: The launch of Alien.gov, expected by many to be a historic UFO disclosure, instead delivered a political immigration message. The rollout sparked backlash from UFO researchers, disclosure advocates, and ordinary Americans who sought answers. Critics compared the event to former Arizona Governor Fife Symington’s handling of the Phoenix Lights, questioning government credibility.

de.title: Trumps Alien.gov-Enthüllung wird zur Einwanderungssatire und versetzt die UFO-Enthüllungs-Community in Aufruhr
de.summary: Der Start von Alien.gov, von dem viele eine historische UFO-Enthüllung erwarteten, übermittelte stattdessen eine politische Einwanderungsbotschaft. Die Einführung löste Gegenreaktionen von UFO-Forschern, Offenlegungsbefürwortern und einfachen Amerikanern aus, die nach Antworten suchten. Kritiker verglichen das Ereignis mit dem Umgang des ehemaligen Gouverneurs von Arizona, Fife Symington, mit den Phoenix Lights und stellten die Glaubwürdigkeit der Regierung in Frage.

articles.title: Former Pentagon-Linked Physicist Alleges the United States Has Retrieved Biological Remains From Four Types of Alien Life Forms
articles.summary: Dr. Hal Puthoff, a former CIA‑funded researcher, said the U.S. has recovered four distinct extraterrestrial species from crashed UFOs, citing people involved in the recoveries. Dr. Eric Davis identified the species as Grays, Nordics, Insectoids, and Reptilians, describing each as humanoid with two arms and legs, and noting that Nordics and Reptilians are about six feet tall. Nordics are described as highly human‑like and resembling northern Europeans, while Reptilians are scaley, lizard‑like with human limbs and long tails; Grays are small, massive‑eyed, hairless, and Insectoids resemble mantises. Former Air Force Intelligence officer David Grusch testified in 2023 that the U.S. possessed non‑human biologics recovered from dozens of crashed UFOs. These claims are based on testimony from members of a crash‑retrieval program featured in Dan Farrah’s film “Age of Disclosure,” and Farrah reported that interviewees have declined to speak publicly.

articles.title: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna Frames UFO Disclosure Through The Book of Enoch As A Window Into A Reality Beyond Human Perception
articles.summary: Florida Representative Anna Paulina Luna publicly linked the ongoing UAP discussion to themes in the Book of Enoch, suggesting a possible connection between unidentified aerial phenomena and ancient accounts of heavenly beings. Luna’s remarks contrast with the evidence‑driven tone that has characterized recent disclosure efforts, but she frames the link through the interdimensional hypothesis and Carl Sagan’s Flatland analogy, which explain how beings from other dimensions might appear incomprehensible. The modern UAP conversation, recognized by NASA and the Department of Defense, includes documented observations of objects that accelerate suddenly, travel across media, and behave in ways that do not match known propulsion or aerodynamics. The Book of Enoch describes Watchers who descend from the heavens, interact with humanity, and impart advanced knowledge, and Luna notes structural parallels between these narratives and the interdimensional hypothesis, though she does not claim the texts provide scientific evidence. At present there is no verified evidence that UAPs are linked to the entities described in the Book of Enoch; the connection remains speculative and will depend on future evidence. The discussion around UFOs has broadened to include questions of reality, perception, and long‑standing encounters with the unknown, challenging policymakers to distinguish belief, theory, and evidence.

en.title: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna Frames UFO Disclosure Through The Book of Enoch As A Window Into A Reality Beyond Human Perception
en.summary: Florida Representative Anna Paulina Luna publicly linked the ongoing UAP discussion to themes in the Book of Enoch, suggesting a possible connection between unidentified aerial phenomena and ancient accounts of heavenly beings. Luna’s remarks contrast with the evidence‑driven tone that has characterized recent disclosure efforts, but she frames the link through the interdimensional hypothesis and Carl Sagan’s Flatland analogy, which explain how beings from other dimensions might appear incomprehensible.

de.title: Die Abgeordnete Anna Paulina Luna stellt die UFO-Enthüllung anhand des Buches Henoch als Fenster in eine Realität dar, die jenseits der menschlichen Wahrnehmung liegt
de.summary: Die Vertreterin von Florida, Anna Paulina Luna, hat die laufende UAP-Diskussion öffentlich mit Themen im Buch Henoch in Verbindung gebracht und einen möglichen Zusammenhang zwischen unbekannten Luftphänomenen und alten Berichten über himmlische Wesen angedeutet. Lunas Bemerkungen stehen im Gegensatz zu dem evidenzbasierten Ton, der die jüngsten Enthüllungsbemühungen geprägt hat, aber sie formuliert den Zusammenhang durch die interdimensionale Hypothese und Carl Sagans Flatland-Analogie, die erklären, wie Wesen aus anderen Dimensionen unverständlich erscheinen könnten.

articles.title: Secret agent, who was about to blow the lid off UFO secrets, died 5 years ago. A whistleblower has now raised suspicion
articles.summary: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released. The FBI is investigating a series of missing and dead scientists linked to secret nuclear and UFO programs, including the disappearance of retired General William Neil McCasland. Other scientists, such as David Wilcock, have also died under suspicious circumstances, adding to the pattern of unexplained losses.

en.title: Secret agent, who was about to blow the lid off UFO secrets, died 5 years ago. A whistleblower has now raised suspicion
en.summary: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released.

de.title: Der Geheimagent, der UFO-Geheimnisse enthüllen wollte, starb vor fünf Jahren. Ein Whistleblower hat nun Verdacht geäußert
de.summary: Kevin Childress, ein 30-jähriger Kriminalermittler des Energieministeriums, starb 2021 unerwartet in seinem Haus in Georgia, wobei die Behörden Komplikationen durch COVID-19 anführten. UFO-Whistleblower Luis Elizondo behauptet, Childress sei vor seinem Tod gesund gewesen und habe gewarnt, dass das DOE eine wichtige Rolle in UAP-Programmen gespielt habe. Elizondo sagt, das Energieministerium versuche ihn zum Schweigen zu bringen und stellt fest, dass weder eine öffentliche Autopsie noch eine detaillierte Todesursache veröffentlicht wurden.

articles.title: MITRE moves to comply with lawmaker’s request for UAP records and assets dating back to 1930
articles.summary: MITRE Corporation is reviewing its archives to comply with a request from Rep. Eric Burlison for UAP records dating back to 1930, seeking to determine whether the organization has ever possessed or handled information on unidentified anomalous phenomena. The request, which includes more than 40 specific data requests and instructions to designate a senior official, issue a preservation hold, and deliver unclassified records within 45 days, also asks for records involving major defense contractors and UAP‑related work. A MITRE spokesperson said that if relevant material is found, the company will coordinate with federal agencies to provide the assets. The request is part of a broader congressional effort to increase UAP disclosure, though no evidence of extraterrestrial activity has been confirmed.

en.title: MITRE moves to comply with lawmaker’s request for UAP records and assets dating back to 1930
en.summary: MITRE Corporation is reviewing its archives to comply with a request from Rep. Eric Burlison for UAP records dating back to 1930, seeking to determine whether the organization has ever possessed or handled information on unidentified anomalous phenomena. The request, which includes more than 40 specific data requests and instructions to designate a senior official, issue a preservation hold, and deliver unclassified records within 45 days, also asks for records involving major defense contractors and UAP‑related work.

de.title: MITRE kommt der Forderung des Gesetzgebers nach UAP-Aufzeichnungen und Vermögenswerten aus dem Jahr 1930 nach
de.summary: Die MITRE Corporation überprüft ihre Archive, um einer Anfrage des Abgeordneten Eric Burlison nach UAP-Aufzeichnungen aus dem Jahr 1930 nachzukommen und herauszufinden, ob die Organisation jemals Informationen über nicht identifizierte anomale Phänomene besessen oder verarbeitet hat. In der Anfrage, die mehr als 40 spezifische Datenanfragen und Anweisungen zur Benennung eines hochrangigen Beamten, zur Ausstellung einer Aufbewahrungssperre und zur Übermittlung nicht klassifizierter Unterlagen innerhalb von 45 Tagen umfasst, werden auch Unterlagen gefordert, die große Verteidigungsunternehmen und UAP-bezogene Arbeiten betreffen.

articles.title: Multiple Pastors Claim U.S. Military Intelligence Officers Secretly Briefed Them To Prepare Their Congregations For UAP Disclosure
articles.summary: Several religious leaders say they were privately briefed by U.S. military intelligence officers to prepare their congregations for UAP disclosure. The White House has not denied these claims. President Trump has promised that “never‑before‑seen” UAP files will arrive “very, very soon.” Televangelist Perry Stone’s viral UFO warning coincides with Trump’s promised file release and congressional pressure for disclosure. The situation reflects a growing demand for transparency and public accountability regarding UAPs.

de.title: Mehrere Pastoren behaupten, US-Militärgeheimdienstoffiziere hätten sie heimlich informiert, um ihre Gemeinden auf die UAP-Offenlegung vorzubereiten
de.summary: Mehrere religiöse Führer gaben an, dass sie privat von Offizieren des US-Militärgeheimdienstes informiert wurden, um ihre Gemeinden auf die Offenlegung der UAP vorzubereiten. Das Weiße Haus hat diese Behauptungen nicht bestritten. Präsident Trump hat versprochen, dass „noch nie dagewesene“ UAP-Dateien „sehr, sehr bald“ eintreffen werden. Die virale UFO-Warnung des Fernsehevangelisten Perry Stone fällt mit Trumps versprochener Aktenveröffentlichung und dem Druck des Kongresses zur Offenlegung zusammen.

articles.title: The World's Largest UFO Conference Is Open Today, and It's Free
articles.summary: The world's largest UFO and UAP conference is underway in the Coachella Valley. Contact in the Desert opened its 12th annual event Thursday at the Renaissance Esmeralda Resort in Indian Wells, running through June 1. The conference brings together scientists, researchers, and journalists from around the world for panels and discussions on extraterrestrial life, UAP disclosure, and other unexplained phenomena. All of Thursday’s programming is free and open to the public. One‑day and five‑day passes are available at contactinthedesert.com.

de.title: Die weltweit größte UFO-Konferenz ist heute geöffnet und kostenlos
de.summary: Im Coachella Valley findet die weltweit größte UFO- und UAP-Konferenz statt. Contact in the Desert eröffnete am Donnerstag im Renaissance Esmeralda Resort in Indian Wells seine 12. jährliche Veranstaltung, die bis zum 1. Juni läuft. Die Konferenz bringt Wissenschaftler, Forscher und Journalisten aus der ganzen Welt zu Panels und Diskussionen über außerirdisches Leben, UAP-Offenlegung und andere ungeklärte Phänomene zusammen.

summaries.program-former-pentagon-linked-physicist: Dr. Hal Puthoff, a former CIA‑funded researcher, said the U.S. has recovered four distinct extraterrestrial species from crashed UFOs, citing people involved in the recoveries. Dr. Eric Davis identified the species as Grays, Nordics, Insectoids, and Reptilians, describing each as humanoid with two arms and legs, and noting that Nordics and Reptilians are about six feet tall. Nordics are described as highly human‑like and resembling northern Europeans, while Reptilians are scaley, lizard‑like with human limbs and long tails; Grays are small, massive‑eyed, hairless, and Insectoids resemble mantises. Former Air Force Intelligence officer David Grusch testified in 2023 that the U.S. possessed non‑human biologics recovered from dozens of crashed UFOs. These claims are based on testimony from members of a crash‑retrieval program featured in Dan Farrah’s film “Age of Disclosure,” and Farrah reported that interviewees have declined to speak publicly.
summaries.sighting-rep-anna-paulina-luna-frames-uf: Florida Representative Anna Paulina Luna publicly linked the ongoing UAP discussion to themes in the Book of Enoch, suggesting a possible connection between unidentified aerial phenomena and ancient accounts of heavenly beings. Luna’s remarks contrast with the evidence‑driven tone that has characterized recent disclosure efforts, but she frames the link through the interdimensional hypothesis and Carl Sagan’s Flatland analogy, which explain how beings from other dimensions might appear incomprehensible. The modern UAP conversation, recognized by NASA and the Department of Defense, includes documented observations of objects that accelerate suddenly, travel across media, and behave in ways that do not match known propulsion or aerodynamics. The Book of Enoch describes Watchers who descend from the heavens, interact with humanity, and impart advanced knowledge, and Luna notes structural parallels between these narratives and the interdimensional hypothesis, though she does not claim the texts provide scientific evidence. At present there is no verified evidence that UAPs are linked to the entities described in the Book of Enoch; the connection remains speculative and will depend on future evidence. The discussion around UFOs has broadened to include questions of reality, perception, and long‑standing encounters with the unknown, challenging policymakers to distinguish belief, theory, and evidence.
summaries.secret-agent-who-was-about-to-blow-the-l: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released. The FBI is investigating a series of missing and dead scientists linked to secret nuclear and UFO programs, including the disappearance of retired General William Neil McCasland. Other scientists, such as David Wilcock, have also died under suspicious circumstances, adding to the pattern of unexplained losses.
summaries.program-mitre-moves-to-comply-with-lawma: MITRE Corporation is reviewing its archives to comply with a request from Rep. Eric Burlison for UAP records dating back to 1930, seeking to determine whether the organization has ever possessed or handled information on unidentified anomalous phenomena. The request, which includes more than 40 specific data requests and instructions to designate a senior official, issue a preservation hold, and deliver unclassified records within 45 days, also asks for records involving major defense contractors and UAP‑related work. A MITRE spokesperson said that if relevant material is found, the company will coordinate with federal agencies to provide the assets. The request is part of a broader congressional effort to increase UAP disclosure, though no evidence of extraterrestrial activity has been confirmed.
summaries.file-release-multiple-pastors-claim-u-s-: Several religious leaders say they were privately briefed by U.S. military intelligence officers to prepare their congregations for UAP disclosure. The White House has not denied these claims. President Trump has promised that “never‑before‑seen” UAP files will arrive “very, very soon.” Televangelist Perry Stone’s viral UFO warning coincides with Trump’s promised file release and congressional pressure for disclosure. The situation reflects a growing demand for transparency and public accountability regarding UAPs.
summaries.the-world-s-largest-ufo-conference-is-op: The world's largest UFO and UAP conference is underway in the Coachella Valley. Contact in the Desert opened its 12th annual event Thursday at the Renaissance Esmeralda Resort in Indian Wells, running through June 1. The conference brings together scientists, researchers, and journalists from around the world for panels and discussions on extraterrestrial life, UAP disclosure, and other unexplained phenomena. All of Thursday’s programming is free and open to the public. One‑day and five‑day passes are available at contactinthedesert.com.

en.title: Alien Whistleblower Claims US Has 'Dismembered Gray Bodies' Hidden Inside Underground Military Bases
en.summary: Timothy Alberino, an investigative writer, claimed in an interview on Redacted that the U.S. government has recovered alien biologics and that crash‑retrieval operations involving non‑human craft and bodies exist outside elected officials’ oversight. He said that the most sensitive UAP information is controlled by private aerospace contractors and highly compartmentalised defence programmes, and that some operations are designed to avoid congressional oversight.

de.title: Außerirdischer Whistleblower behauptet, die USA hätten „graue Körper zerstückelt“, die in unterirdischen Militärstützpunkten versteckt seien
de.summary: Timothy Alberino, ein investigativer Autor, behauptete in einem Interview auf Redacted, dass die US-Regierung außerirdische Biologika geborgen habe und dass Absturzbergungsoperationen mit nichtmenschlichen Fahrzeugen und Leichen außerhalb der Aufsicht gewählter Beamter stünden. Er sagte, dass die sensibelsten UAP-Informationen von privaten Luft- und Raumfahrtunternehmen und stark abgeschotteten Verteidigungsprogrammen kontrolliert werden und dass einige Operationen darauf ausgelegt seien, der Aufsicht des Kongresses zu entgehen.

en.title: Whistleblower claims CIA used DNA data from Ancestry and 23andMe customers in search for aliens
en.summary: A whistleblower, philosopher and novelist Jason Reza Jorjani, claims the CIA allegedly used a backdoor to access 23andMe and Ancestry.com data to identify individuals with a genetic variance he says is linked to extraterrestrial DNA. Jorjani says he learned of the program from army veteran Lyn Buchanan, who claims he was a psychic spy in the CIA’s remote‑viewing program and that former CIA analyst Christopher “Kit” Green created the backdoor.

de.title: Whistleblower behauptet, die CIA habe DNA-Daten von Ancestry- und 23andMe-Kunden bei der Suche nach Außerirdischen verwendet
de.summary: Ein Whistleblower, Philosoph und Romanautor Jason Reza Jorjani, behauptet, die CIA habe angeblich eine Hintertür genutzt, um auf Daten von 23andMe und Ancestry.com zuzugreifen, um Personen mit einer genetischen Varianz zu identifizieren, die seiner Meinung nach mit außerirdischer DNA zusammenhängt. Jorjani sagt, er habe von dem Programm durch den Armeeveteranen Lyn Buchanan erfahren, der behauptet, er sei ein übersinnlicher Spion im Remote-Viewing-Programm der CIA gewesen und der ehemalige CIA-Analyst Christopher „Kit“ Green habe die Hintertür geschaffen.

en.title: Trump’s Alien.gov Reveal Turns Into Immigration Satire and Leaves UFO Disclosure Community Furious
en.summary: The launch of Alien.gov, expected by many to be a historic UFO disclosure, instead delivered a political immigration message. The rollout sparked backlash from UFO researchers, disclosure advocates, and ordinary Americans who sought answers. Critics compared the event to former Arizona Governor Fife Symington’s handling of the Phoenix Lights, questioning government credibility.

de.title: Trumps Alien.gov-Enthüllung wird zur Einwanderungssatire und versetzt die UFO-Enthüllungs-Community in Aufruhr
de.summary: Der Start von Alien.gov, von dem viele eine historische UFO-Enthüllung erwarteten, übermittelte stattdessen eine politische Einwanderungsbotschaft. Die Einführung löste Gegenreaktionen von UFO-Forschern, Offenlegungsbefürwortern und einfachen Amerikanern aus, die nach Antworten suchten. Kritiker verglichen das Ereignis mit dem Umgang des ehemaligen Gouverneurs von Arizona, Fife Symington, mit den Phoenix Lights und stellten die Glaubwürdigkeit der Regierung in Frage.

en.summary: Dr. Hal Puthoff, a former CIA‑funded researcher, said the U.S. has recovered four distinct extraterrestrial species from crashed UFOs, citing people involved in the recoveries. Dr.

de.title: Ehemaliger mit dem Pentagon verbundener Physiker behauptet, die Vereinigten Staaten hätten biologische Überreste von vier Arten außerirdischer Lebensformen geborgen
de.summary: Dr. Hal Puthoff, ein ehemaliger von der CIA finanzierter Forscher, sagte, die USA hätten vier verschiedene außerirdische Arten aus abgestürzten UFOs geborgen und verwies dabei auf Personen, die an den Bergungen beteiligt waren. Dr.

en.title: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna Frames UFO Disclosure Through The Book of Enoch As A Window Into A Reality Beyond Human Perception
en.summary: Florida Representative Anna Paulina Luna publicly linked the ongoing UAP discussion to themes in the Book of Enoch, suggesting a possible connection between unidentified aerial phenomena and ancient accounts of heavenly beings. Luna’s remarks contrast with the evidence‑driven tone that has characterized recent disclosure efforts, but she frames the link through the interdimensional hypothesis and Carl Sagan’s Flatland analogy, which explain how beings from other dimensions might appear incomprehensible.

de.title: Die Abgeordnete Anna Paulina Luna stellt die UFO-Enthüllung anhand des Buches Henoch als Fenster in eine Realität dar, die jenseits der menschlichen Wahrnehmung liegt
de.summary: Die Vertreterin von Florida, Anna Paulina Luna, hat die laufende UAP-Diskussion öffentlich mit Themen im Buch Henoch in Verbindung gebracht und einen möglichen Zusammenhang zwischen unbekannten Luftphänomenen und alten Berichten über himmlische Wesen angedeutet. Lunas Bemerkungen stehen im Gegensatz zu dem evidenzbasierten Ton, der die jüngsten Enthüllungsbemühungen geprägt hat, aber sie formuliert den Zusammenhang durch die interdimensionale Hypothese und Carl Sagans Flatland-Analogie, die erklären, wie Wesen aus anderen Dimensionen unverständlich erscheinen könnten.

en.title: Secret agent, who was about to blow the lid off UFO secrets, died 5 years ago. A whistleblower has now raised suspicion
en.summary: Kevin Childress, a 30‑year Department of Energy criminal investigator, died unexpectedly in 2021 at his Georgia home, with authorities citing complications from COVID‑19. UFO whistleblower Luis Elizondo claims Childress was healthy before his death and had warned that the DOE had a significant role in UAP programs. Elizondo says the DOE is trying to silence him and notes that no public autopsy or detailed cause of death has been released.

de.title: Der Geheimagent, der UFO-Geheimnisse enthüllen wollte, starb vor fünf Jahren. Ein Whistleblower hat nun Verdacht geäußert
de.summary: Kevin Childress, ein 30-jähriger Kriminalermittler des Energieministeriums, starb 2021 unerwartet in seinem Haus in Georgia, wobei die Behörden Komplikationen durch COVID-19 anführten. UFO-Whistleblower Luis Elizondo behauptet, Childress sei vor seinem Tod gesund gewesen und habe gewarnt, dass das DOE eine wichtige Rolle in UAP-Programmen gespielt habe. Elizondo sagt, das Energieministerium versuche ihn zum Schweigen zu bringen und stellt fest, dass weder eine öffentliche Autopsie noch eine detaillierte Todesursache veröffentlicht wurden.

en.title: MITRE moves to comply with lawmaker’s request for UAP records and assets dating back to 1930
en.summary: MITRE Corporation is reviewing its archives to comply with a request from Rep. Eric Burlison for UAP records dating back to 1930, seeking to determine whether the organization has ever possessed or handled information on unidentified anomalous phenomena. The request, which includes more than 40 specific data requests and instructions to designate a senior official, issue a preservation hold, and deliver unclassified records within 45 days, also asks for records involving major defense contractors and UAP‑related work.

de.title: MITRE kommt der Forderung des Gesetzgebers nach UAP-Aufzeichnungen und Vermögenswerten aus dem Jahr 1930 nach
de.summary: Die MITRE Corporation überprüft ihre Archive, um einer Anfrage des Abgeordneten Eric Burlison nach UAP-Aufzeichnungen aus dem Jahr 1930 nachzukommen und herauszufinden, ob die Organisation jemals Informationen über nicht identifizierte anomale Phänomene besessen oder verarbeitet hat. In der Anfrage, die mehr als 40 spezifische Datenanfragen und Anweisungen zur Benennung eines hochrangigen Beamten, zur Ausstellung einer Aufbewahrungssperre und zur Übermittlung nicht klassifizierter Unterlagen innerhalb von 45 Tagen umfasst, werden auch Unterlagen gefordert, die große Verteidigungsunternehmen und UAP-bezogene Arbeiten betreffen.

en.title: Multiple Pastors Claim U.S. Military Intelligence Officers Secretly Briefed Them To Prepare Their Congregations For UAP Disclosure
en.summary: Several religious leaders say they were privately briefed by U.S. military intelligence officers to prepare their congregations for UAP disclosure. The White House has not denied these claims. President Trump has promised that “never‑before‑seen” UAP files will arrive “very, very soon.” Televangelist Perry Stone’s viral UFO warning coincides with Trump’s promised file release and congressional pressure for disclosure.

de.title: Mehrere Pastoren behaupten, US-Militärgeheimdienstoffiziere hätten sie heimlich informiert, um ihre Gemeinden auf die UAP-Offenlegung vorzubereiten
de.summary: Mehrere religiöse Führer gaben an, dass sie privat von Offizieren des US-Militärgeheimdienstes informiert wurden, um ihre Gemeinden auf die Offenlegung der UAP vorzubereiten. Das Weiße Haus hat diese Behauptungen nicht bestritten. Präsident Trump hat versprochen, dass „noch nie dagewesene“ UAP-Dateien „sehr, sehr bald“ eintreffen werden. Die virale UFO-Warnung des Fernsehevangelisten Perry Stone fällt mit Trumps versprochener Aktenveröffentlichung und dem Druck des Kongresses zur Offenlegung zusammen.

en.title: The World's Largest UFO Conference Is Open Today, and It's Free
en.summary: The world's largest UFO and UAP conference is underway in the Coachella Valley. Contact in the Desert opened its 12th annual event Thursday at the Renaissance Esmeralda Resort in Indian Wells, running through June 1. The conference brings together scientists, researchers, and journalists from around the world for panels and discussions on extraterrestrial life, UAP disclosure, and other unexplained phenomena.

de.title: Die weltweit größte UFO-Konferenz ist heute geöffnet und kostenlos
de.summary: Im Coachella Valley findet die weltweit größte UFO- und UAP-Konferenz statt. Contact in the Desert eröffnete am Donnerstag im Renaissance Esmeralda Resort in Indian Wells seine 12. jährliche Veranstaltung, die bis zum 1. Juni läuft. Die Konferenz bringt Wissenschaftler, Forscher und Journalisten aus der ganzen Welt zu Panels und Diskussionen über außerirdisches Leben, UAP-Offenlegung und andere ungeklärte Phänomene zusammen.
